claim_text: All six strict transform families are state-transition-equivalent (byte-identical post-call snapshots over >15000 property cases, zero mismatch).
At least one strict equivalent transform causes significant paired success degradation for real models (Claude/Codex).
Degradation persists after matching schema tokens / content (not explained by length).
reviewer_attack: effect vanishes under content match -> claim fails

claim_text: Model ranking (Claude vs Codex) reverses across equivalent interfaces (Kendall tau < 1).
reviewer_attack: need >=6 models for a ranking claim

claim_text: A label-free STNF reduces degradation on held-out transforms vs the strongest non-oracle baseline.
limitations: static covers structural only; LLM-STNF needed for semantic
reviewer_attack: STNF just reverts to original interface
